MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Brian Carter, Esq., 707-462-6694, appearing for Marie Torango and Pauline Ting, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Adam Corrin appearing via court call, Esq., 209-478-2621, appearing for Ting, for Defendant and moving party.

Court reporter: Tamara Willat. CSR #4609 telephone:(415)272-1753. Email: tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net

Aruged (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Mr. Corrin argued that there is no triable issue of fact.

The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER TING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Under California Code of Civil Procedure section 437 subdivision (c) paragraph (c), Plaintiffs demonstrate that there is a triable issue of material fact remaining, including for claims one, two, three, and four. (See, e.g., Exhibit 19.) is taken under submission. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N. Wong, reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-15-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Spencer Sinclair appearing via court call, Esq., 209-478-2621, appearing for Peter Ting, defendant and moving party.

Brian Carter appearing via court call, Esq., 707-462-6692, appearing for Marie Torango, for Plaintiff/opposing party.

Hearing held. Counsel and staff attorney have a discussion regarding the date that parties can agree to continue this motion to.

The Court adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER TING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defs Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:30am.m, in Dept. 501. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
